subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Allusion cannot convey what Reality teaches. Christ said, 'What has happened in the past will happen again in the future.' The reason of this is that all things are under the operation of Divine Law
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @oneness; unity of religion, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @limits of language, @transcendence; unknowability of God
